title: COPY INTO from .. LOCKED doubles input data
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(v1 Int32, v2 String, v3 Date DEFAULT today());
INSERT INTO t1(v1, v2) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL);
CREATE INDEX idx_v1 ON t1(v1) TYPE minmax;
INSERT INTO t1 SELECT v1 + 1 AS v1, v2, v3 FROM t1 WHERE v3 IS NOT NULL;
